walking_skeleton_scenario: the browser reaches the backend only through the same-origin /ui-server gateway; no browser flow calls the backend /api directly, and backendClient is gone

acceptance_criteria.statement: The browser-reachable source graph contains no apiGet/apiPost/apiPatch/apiUpload transport symbols and the catalog data plane performs no credentials:'include' browser fetch.
acceptance_criteria.state_at_skeleton: RED — backendClient still exists and is imported by metadataApiSource, app-shell, onboarding-client, catalog/index

acceptance_criteria.statement: Driving the browser onboarding + catalog + mutation + upload flows with a fetch spy issues zero requests to the backend /api — only /ui-server/* and the storage presigned PUT are allowed.

steps.title: Skeleton — boundary guard tests (RED) + ApiError relocation seam + roadmap SSOT
steps.intent: Land the two ACs as honest RED tests; create ui/app/lib/api-error.ts as the future home of ApiError (seam only, backendClient NOT deleted); write this DISTILL SSOT. Done-state: ui/ compiles, both guard tests exist and are RED.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit; cd ui && npx vitest run app/__tests__/boundary/no-direct-backend.test.ts (expect RED)

steps.title: Repoint the onboarding Phase-B probe off browser /api onto /ui-server
steps.intent: Wire app-shell's default onboarding client to the same-origin gateway (onboarding-client → /ui-server/*) instead of the /api-direct apiGet/apiPost defaultClient, so driver.probeOrg() no longer fetches /api/orgs/me from the browser.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run app-shell onboarding-client no-direct-backend

steps.title: Repoint the one-step dataset upload (createDataset → /api/uploads) onto /ui-server
steps.intent: Move metadataApiSource.createDataset off the browser-direct apiUpload('/api/uploads') onto a /ui-server upload broker (server-side multipart forward), so the browser upload flow lands only on /ui-server.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run metadataApiSource no-direct-backend

steps.title: Converge org-global refresh to RRv7 revalidation; retire browser metadataApiSource reads
steps.intent: Move the browser-direct catalog reads/mutations (getProjects, lineage getters, org/dbt reads, renameModel/setModelName/toggleAuditEntry) onto server loaders + /ui-server actions with RRv7 revalidation, so no browser catalog read or mutation touches /api.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run no-direct-backend

steps.title: Delete backendClient; relocate ApiError; strip barrel re-exports (AC1 green)
steps.intent: Delete ui/app/catalog/dataSources/backendClient.ts, repoint every ApiError importer to ui/app/lib/api-error.ts, and remove the catalog/index barrel re-exports of apiGet/apiPatch. AC1 goes green.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit; cd ui && npx vitest run

steps.title: Assert the single boundary — AC2 runtime guard green + convergence gate
steps.intent: With every browser flow on the gateway, AC2 goes green (zero /api hits). Reconcile the guard harness with the final wiring if the read/mutation entrypoints changed, and run the full ui/ suite as the convergence gate.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit; cd ui && npx vitest run

final_gate: commit per step; PR into catalog-behind-bff/release-6
